uriVariables) throws RestClientException;HttpHeaders headForHeaders(String url, Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;HttpHeaders headForHeaders(URI url) throws RestClientException;// POST@NullableURI postForLocation(String url, @Nullable Object request, Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;@NullableURI postForLocation(String url, @Nullable Object request, Map<String, ?> uriVariables)        throws RestClientException;@NullableURI postForLocation(URI url, @Nullable Object request) throws RestClientException;@Nullable<T> T postForObject(String url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType,        Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;@Nullable<T> T postForObject(String url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType,        Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;@Nullable<T> T postForObject(URI url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> postForEntity(String url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType,        Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> postForEntity(String url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType,        Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> postForEntity(URI url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType)        throws RestClientException;// PUTvoid put(String url, @Nullable Object request, Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;void put(String url, @Nullable Object request, Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;void put(URI url, @Nullable Object request) throws RestClientException;// PATCH@Nullable<T> T patchForObject(String url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType, Object... uriVariables)        throws RestClientException;@Nullable<T> T patchForObject(String url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType,        Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;@Nullable<T> T patchForObject(URI url, @Nullable Object request, Class<T> responseType)        throws RestClientException;// DELETEvoid delete(String url, Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;void delete(String url, Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;void delete(URI url) throws RestClientException;// OPTIONSSet<HttpMethod> optionsForAllow(String url, Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;Set<HttpMethod> optionsForAllow(String url, Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;Set<HttpMethod> optionsForAllow(URI url) throws RestClientException;// exchange<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(String url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable HttpEntity<?> requestEntity,        Class<T> responseType, Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(String url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable HttpEntity<?> requestEntity,        Class<T> responseType, Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(URI url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable HttpEntity<?> requestEntity,        Class<T> responseType) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(String url,HttpMethod method, @Nullable HttpEntity<?> requestEntity,        ParameterizedTypeReference<T> responseType, Object... uriVariables) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(String url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable HttpEntity<?> requestEntity,        ParameterizedTypeReference<T> responseType, Map<String, ?> uriVariables) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(URI url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable HttpEntity<?> requestEntity,        ParameterizedTypeReference<T> responseType) throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(RequestEntity<?> requestEntity, Class<T> responseType)        throws RestClientException;<T> ResponseEntity<T> exchange(RequestEntity<?> requestEntity, ParameterizedTypeReference<T> responseType)        throws RestClientException;// General execution@Nullable<T> T execute(String url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable RequestCallback requestCallback,        @Nullable ResponseExtractor<T> responseExtractor, Object... uriVariables)        throws RestClientException;@Nullable<T> T execute(String url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable RequestCallback requestCallback,        @Nullable ResponseExtractor<T> responseExtractor, Map<String, ?> uriVariables)        throws RestClientException;@Nullable<T> T execute(URI url, HttpMethod method, @Nullable RequestCallback requestCallback,        @Nullable ResponseExtractor<T> responseExtractor) throws RestClientException;}

如何使用 RestTemplate ？

@Autowiredprivate RestTemplateBuilder builder;@Beanpublic RestTemplate restTemplate() {    return builder.build();}

点进 RestTemplateBuilder

// 构建RestTemplatepublic RestTemplate build() {    return build(RestTemplate.class);}public <T extends RestTemplate> T build(Class<T> restTemplateClass) {    // 反射创建RestTemplate实例    return configure(BeanUtils.instantiateClass(restTemplateClass));}public <T extends RestTemplate> T configure(T restTemplate) {    // 设置RestTemplate的请求工厂    configureRequestFactory(restTemplate);    // ...    return restTemplate;}private void configureRequestFactory(RestTemplate restTemplate) {    ClientHttpRequestFactory requestFactory = null;    // 使用构造者中的请求工厂    if (this.requestFactorySupplier != null) {        requestFactory = this.requestFactorySupplier.get();    }    else if (this.detectRequestFactory) {        // 到类路径中加载        requestFactory = new ClientHttpRequestFactorySupplier().get();    }    // ...}

点进 ClientHttpRequestFactorySupplier

private static final Map<String, String> REQUEST_FACTORY_CANDIDATES;static {    // 使用LinkedHashMap设置加载优先级别    Map<String, String> candidates = new LinkedHashMap<>();    candidates.put("org.apache.http.client.HttpClient",            "org.springframework.http.client.HttpComponentsClientHttpRequestFactory");    candidates.put("okhttp3.OkHttpClient",            "org.springframework.http.client.OkHttp3ClientHttpRequestFactory");    REQUEST_FACTORY_CANDIDATES = Collections.unmodifiableMap(candidates);}@Overridepublic ClientHttpRequestFactory get() {    for (Map.Entry<String, String> candidate : REQUEST_FACTORY_CANDIDATES            .entrySet()) {        ClassLoader classLoader = getClass().getClassLoader();        if (ClassUtils.isPresent(candidate.getKey(), classLoader)) {            Class<?> factoryClass = ClassUtils.resolveClassName(candidate.getValue(),                    classLoader);            return (ClientHttpRequestFactory) BeanUtils                    .instantiateClass(factoryClass);        }    }    // 如果类路径中没有HttpClient和OkHttp则使用URLConnection    return new SimpleClientHttpRequestFactory();}

OpenFeign

基本介绍

Feign本来是Spring Cloud Netflix开源项目的一部分，后来从项目中独立了出来成为一个通用的Java类库并改名为OpenFeign。OpenFeign是一个声明式、模板化的HTTP客户端抽象，支持Feign、JAX-RS、SpringMVC 等风格注解，而且内置 Ribbon 和 Hystrix 功能。OpenFeign 和 RestTemplate 一样，默认采用 URLConnection 进行HTTP通信，同时也支持 Apache HttpClient 和 OkHttp。

OpenFeign 架构图

注：使用 OpenFeign 时可以通过实现 Interceptor 接口来自定义拦截器，例如可以对在拦截器中同意设置 HTTP 请求头。

快速入门

依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <!-- SpringClout OpenFeign -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-openfeign</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>

服务提供者

@RequestMapping("/user")@RestControllerpublic class UserController {     @DeleteMapping("/delete/{id}")    public User deleteUserById(@PathVariable Long id) {        //...    }    @GetMapping("/find/all")    public List<User> findAll() {        //...    }    @PostMapping("/add")    public User addUser(String user) throws Exception {        //...    }}

服务消费者

FeignClient定义

@FeignClient("MSA-EUREKA-PROVIDER-USER")// 服务名称public interface UserFeignClient {    @GetMapping("/user/find/all")    List selectAllUser();    @DeleteMapping("/user/delete/{id}")    User deleteUserById(@PathVariable Long id);    // 多参数提交方法1    // Feign默认将POJO转为Json并使用Content-Type：application/json进行参数传输，这时服务提供方需要使用@RequestBody来接收    //@PostMapping("/user/add")    //User addUser(User user);    // 多参数提交方法2    @PostMapping("/user/add")    User addUser(@RequestParam Long id,                  @RequestParam String name,                  @RequestParam int age);    // 多参数提交方法3    //@PostMapping("/user/add")    //User addUser(@RequestParam Map<String, Object> user);}

启用Feign

@EnableFeignClients@EnableEurekaClient@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaEurekaComsumerApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) { SpringApplication.run(MsaEurekaComsumerApplication.class, args);    }}

消费服务

@RequestMapping("/msg")@RestControllerpublic class MessageController {    @Autowired    private UserFeignClient userFeignClient;    @DeleteMapping("/delete/{id}")    public ResponseEntity deleteUserById(@PathVariable Long id) {        return ResponseEntity.ok(userFeignClient.deleteUserById(id));    }    @GetMapping("/find/all")    public ResponseEntity findAll() {        List list = userFeignClient.selectAllUser();        return ResponseEntity.ok(list);    }    @PostMapping("/add")    public ResponseEntity addUser(User user) {        // 多参数提交方法1        //return ResponseEntity.ok(userFeignClient.addUser(user));        // 多参数提交方法2       return ResponseEntity.ok(userFeignClient.addUser(user.getId(), user.getName(), user.getAge()));       // 多参数提交方法3//        Map<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();//        map.put("id", user.getId());//        map.put("name", user.getName());//        map.put("age", user.getAge());//        return ResponseEntity.ok(userFeignClient.addUser3(map));    }}

源码浅析

请求是如何被封装的？

FeignClient 样例方法

@FeignClient("MSA-EUREKA-PROVIDER-USER")public interface UserFeignClient {    @DeleteMapping("/user/delete/{id}")    User deleteUserById(@PathVariable Long id);}

请求到来进入 ReflectiveFeign 的 invoke 方法

public class ReflectisveFeign extends Feign {    @Override    public Object invoke(Object proxy, Method method, Object[] args) throws Throwable {        // 触发 MethodHandler        // 默认 SynchronousMethodHandler 来处理        return dispatch.get(method).invoke(args);    }}

SynchronousMethodHandler 的 invoke 方法

private final RequestTemplate.Factory buildTemplateFromArgs;@Overridepublic Object invoke(Object[] argv) throws Throwable {    // 生成请求模板    RequestTemplate template = buildTemplateFromArgs.create(argv);    Retryer retryer = this.retryer.clone();    while (true) {        try {            return executeAndDecode(template);        } catch (RetryableException e) {            retryer.continueOrPropagate(e);            continue;        }    }}

进入 buildTemplateFromArgs.create(argv)，即ReflectiveFeign的create(argv)

@Overridepublic RequestTemplate create(Object[] argv) {    // 根据FeignClient方法元数据初始化请求模板    RequestTemplate mutable = RequestTemplate.from(metadata.template());    // 获取请求参数    Map<String, Object> varBuilder = new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();    // ...    // 设置RequestTemplate，主要是添加请求参数    RequestTemplate template = resolve(argv, mutable, varBuilder);    return template;}

进入 resolve()

public RequestTemplate resolve(Map<String, ?> variables) {    RequestTemplate resolved = RequestTemplate.from(this);    // 设置URI    StringBuilder uri = new StringBuilder();    uri.append(this.uriTemplate.expand(variables));    // 设置请求参数    if (!this.queries.isEmpty()) {      resolved.queries(Collections.emptyMap());      StringBuilder query = new StringBuilder();      Iterator<QueryTemplate> queryTemplates = this.queries.values().iterator();      while (queryTemplates.hasNext()) {        QueryTemplate queryTemplate = queryTemplates.next();        String queryExpanded = queryTemplate.expand(variables);        if (Util.isNotBlank(queryExpanded)) {          query.append(queryExpanded);          if (queryTemplates.hasNext()) {            query.append("&");          }        }      }      String queryString = query.toString();      if (!queryString.isEmpty()) {        Matcher queryMatcher = QUERY_STRING_PATTERN.matcher(uri);        if (queryMatcher.find()) {          uri.append("&");        } else {          uri.append("?");        }        uri.append(queryString);      }    }    // 将值设置到URI    resolved.uri(uri.toString());    // 设置请求头    if (!this.headers.isEmpty()) {      resolved.headers(Collections.emptyMap());      for (HeaderTemplate headerTemplate : this.headers.values()) {        String header = headerTemplate.expand(variables);        if (!header.isEmpty()) {          String headerValues = header.substring(header.indexOf(" ") + 1);          if (!headerValues.isEmpty()) {            resolved.header(headerTemplate.getName(), headerValues);          }        }      }    }    resolved.body(this.body.expand(variables));    resolved.resolved = true;    return resolved;}

返回 SynchronousMethodHandler 的 invoke 方法

@Overridepublic Object invoke(Object[] argv) throws Throwable {    RequestTemplate template = buildTemplateFromArgs.create(argv);    // ...    while (true) {        return executeAndDecode(template);    }}

进入 executeAndDecode 方法

Object executeAndDecode(RequestTemplate template) throws Throwable {    Request request = targetRequest(template);    // FeignClient的execute    Response response = client.execute(request, options);    // ...    return response;}

如何进行负载均衡请求？

进入 FeignRibbonClientAutoConfiguration

// ...@Import({ HttpClientFeignLoadBalancedConfiguration.class,        OkHttpFeignLoadBalancedConfiguration.class,        DefaultFeignLoadBalancedConfiguration.class })public class FeignRibbonClientAutoConfiguration {
  • 默认情况下只有 DefaultFeignLoadBalancedConfiguration 满足自动配置的条件

进入 DefaultFeignLoadBalancedConfiguration

@Configurationclass DefaultFeignLoadBalancedConfiguration {    // 配置默认FeignClient：LoadBalancerFeignClient    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean    public Client feignClient(CachingSpringLoadBalancerFactory cachingFactory,            SpringClientFactory clientFactory) {        // 这里传入了一个默认的FeignClient：Client.Default        return new LoadBalancerFeignClient(new Client.Default(null, null), cachingFactory,                clientFactory);    }}

进入 Client.Default

public interface Client {    // 抽象方法 execute    Response execute(Request request, Options options) throws IOException;    // FeignClient默认实现    class Default implements Client {         @Override        public Response execute(Request request, Options options) throws IOException {            HttpURLConnection connection = convertAndSend(request, options);            return convertResponse(connection, request);        }        HttpURLConnection convertAndSend(Request request, Options options) throws IOException {            // 创建HttpURLConnection实例            final HttpURLConnection connection = (HttpURLConnection) new URL(request.url()).openConnection();            // 设置请求头            // ...            // 发送请求            if (request.requestBody().asBytes() != null) {                connection.setDoOutput(true);                OutputStream out = connection.getOutputStream();                out.write(request.requestBody().asBytes());                out.close();            }            return connection;        }    }}
  • 可以看到默认FeignClient使用的默认HTTP客户端是HttpURLConnection

然后进入 LoadBalancerFeignClient

public class LoadBalancerFeignClient implements Client {    private final Client delegate;    public LoadBalancerFeignClient(Client delegate,/**/) {        this.delegate = delegate;    }    public Client getDelegate() {        return this.delegate;    }    // 获取负载均衡器，FeignLoadBalancer并不是直接实现ILoadBalancer，而是通过继承LoadBalancerContext来实现    // LoadBalancerContext集成了ILoadBalancer    private FeignLoadBalancer lbClient(String clientName) {        return this.lbClientFactory.create(clientName);    }    @Override    public Response execute(Request request, Request.Options options) throws IOException {        // 获取URL内容        URI asUri = URI.create(request.url());        String clientName = asUri.getHost();        URI uriWithoutHost = cleanUrl(request.url(), clientName);        // 构造一个RibbonRequest，其中Request包含了FeignClient        FeignLoadBalancer.RibbonRequest ribbonRequest = new FeignLoadBalancer.RibbonRequest(this.delegate, request, uriWithoutHost);        IClientConfig requestConfig = getClientConfig(options, clientName);        // 【重点】        // 1. FeignClient会使用Ribon默认的负载均衡器ZoneAwareLoadBalancer，即采用最优zone加RoundRibbonRule进行负载均衡        // 2. 得到负载均衡后的Server使用HTTP客户端发送请求并返回结果        return lbClient(clientName).executeWithLoadBalancer(ribbonRequest, requestConfig).toResponse();    }}

基于上面代码，先察一下 FeignLoadBalancer

  • 可以看到 executeWithLoadBalancer 方法是 FeignLoadBalancer 继承 AbstractLoadBalancerAwareClient 得到的

所以，FeignLoadBalancer 的 AbstractLoadBalancerAwareClient 如下：

public T executeWithLoadBalancer(final S request, final IClientConfig requestConfig) throws ClientException {    LoadBalancerCommand<T> command = buildLoadBalancerCommand(request, requestConfig);    // 【重点】负载均衡在LoadBalancerCommand的submit方法中完成。这里是lambda表达式，实际还需要进入submit查看    return command.submit(        new ServerOperation<T>() {            @Override            public Observable<T> call(Server server) {                URI finalUri = reconstructURIWithServer(server, request.getUri());                S requestForServer = (S) request.replaceUri(finalUri);                // 调用FeignLoadBalancer的execute()方法                return Observable.just(AbstractLoadBalancerAwareClient.this.execute(requestForServer, requestConfig));            }        })        .toBlocking()        .single();}

进入负责均衡操作的 LoadBalancerCommand 类

public Observable<T> submit(final ServerOperation<T> operation) {    // 如果没有指定Server的话就使用selectServer()进行负载均衡操作    Observable<T> o = (server == null ? selectServer() : Observable.just(server)).concatMap(/**/);    //...    return o;}private Observable<Server> selectServer() {    return Observable.create(new OnSubscribe<Server>() {        @Override        public void call(Subscriber<? super Server> next) {            // 先前提到FeignLoadBalancer并没有实现ILoadBalancer接口            // 而是通过LoadBalancerContext继承ILoadBalancer实现负载均衡操作            Server server = loadBalancerContext.getServerFromLoadBalancer(loadBalancerURI, loadBalancerKey);               next.onNext(server);            next.onCompleted();        }    });}

LoadBalancerContext 的 getServerFromLoadBalancer方法

public Server getServerFromLoadBalancer(@Nullable URI original, @Nullable Object loadBalancerKey) throws ClientException {    String host = null;    int port = -1;    if (original != null) host = original.getHost();    if (original != null) {        Pair<String, Integer> schemeAndPort = deriveSchemeAndPortFromPartialUri(original);                port = schemeAndPort.second();    }    // 获取负载均衡器    ILoadBalancer lb = getLoadBalancer();    if (host == null) {        if (lb != null){            // 获取负载均衡后的Server            Server svc = lb.chooseServer(loadBalancerKey);            host = svc.getHost();            return svc;        }     }    return new Server(host, port);}

其他配置

全局配置和局部配置

全局和局部配置是父子配置关系，优先局部配置

全局配置

注解

@EnableFeignClients(defaultConfiguration = xxx.class)

配置文件

feign:  client:    default-config: # 默认配置      connectionTimeout: 5000      readTimeout: 5000      loggerLevel: FULL

局部配置

@FeignClient(value = "服务的名字", configuration = xxx.class)

配置文件

feign:  client:    服务的名字:       connectionTimeout: 5000      readTimeout: 5000      loggerLevel: FULL      retryer: xxx.xxx.XxxRetryer      requestInterceptors:           - xxx.xxx.Xxx          - xxx.xxx.Xxx2

开启请求解压缩

feign:  compression:    # 开启解压缩    response:      enabled: true    request:      enabled: true      # 默认 "text/xml", "application/xml", "application/json"      mime-types:        - text/html        - application/json        - multipart/form-data      min-request-size: 2048

设置日志等级

Object executeAndDecode(RequestTemplate template) throws Throwable {    if (logLevel != Logger.Level.NONE) {        logger.logRequest(metadata.configKey(), logLevel, request);    }    // ...    try {        response = client.execute(request, options);    } catch (IOException e) {        if (logLevel != Logger.Level.NONE) {            logger.logIOException(metadata.configKey(), logLevel, e, elapsedTime(start));        }    }    long elapsedTime = TimeUnit.NANOSECONDS.toMillis(System.nanoTime() - start);    // ...    try {        if (logLevel != Logger.Level.NONE) {            response =                logger.logAndRebufferResponse(metadata.configKey(), logLevel, response, elapsedTime);        }        // ...    } catch (IOException e) {        if (logLevel != Logger.Level.NONE) {            logger.logIOException(metadata.configKey(), logLevel, e, elapsedTime);        }    } finally {        //...    }}
  • 以上是 SynchronousMethodHandler 的一段代码，可以看到在 Feign 中采用功能开关/模式开关的操作来控制日志的数据
  • Feign只输出 DEBUG 级别的日志，Feign Logger中的 模式Level 有以下几种：
    • NONE：不记录任何日志（默认级别）
    • BASIC：记录请求方法、URL、响应状态码以及执行的时间
    • HEADERS：BASIC + header 信息
    • FULL：记录请求和响应的 header、body、metadata等信息

使用例子

步骤1：添加 日志Level bean

@Configurationpublic class FeignLogConfig {    @Bean    public Logger.Level loggerLevel() {        return Logger.Level.HEADERS;    }}

步骤2：将添加到全局配置或局部配置中

@FeignClient(value = "MSA-EUREKA-PROVIDER-USER", configuration = RestConfig.class)public interface UserFeignClient {    //...}

步骤3：将环境中的FeignClient接口的日志基本设置为DEBUG级别

logging:  level:    root: info    wiki.td.msaeurekacomsumer01.feign.UserFeignClient: debug

当然，除了这种配置方法之外还可以参考前面局部配置中的日志配置方法

文件上传

@FeignClient(value = "MSA-EUREKA-PROVIDER-USER",         configuration =UserFeignClient.MultipartSupportConfig.class)public interface UserFeignClient {    @PostMapping(value = "/upload", consumes = MediaType.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA_VALUE)    String upload(@RequestPart("file") MultipartFile file);    class MultipartSupportConfig {        @Bean        public Encoder encoder() {            return new SpringFormEncoder();        }    }}

Ribbon配置

因为Feign是基于Ribbon的，所以默认使用Ribbon的配置。但Feign也提供局部配置Ribbon的方法，如下

feign:  client:    服务的名字:      ribbo.connectionTimeout: 5000      ribbo.readTimeout: 5000

启用Apache HttpClient或OkHttp

添加依赖

<dependency>    <groupId>com.squareup.okhttp3</groupId>    <artifactId>okhttp</artifactId>    <version>4.2.2</version></dependency>

添加配置

feign:  okhttp:    enabled: true

参考

  • OkHttp
  • OpenFeign
  • Suggest supporting POJO as request parameter #1253
  • Differences between netflix.feign & openfeign
  • 《SpringCloud与Docker 微服务架构实战》

内容修订

entry.title: 微服务开发技术篇-客户端负载均衡
entry.content:
什么是客户端负载均衡

看到负载均衡很多人首先想到的是Nginx。Nginx是一个代理服务器，提供正反两种模式的代理服务。其中负载均衡就是基于反向代理来实现的，这种负载均衡方式可以理解为后端负载均衡，即客户端请求到来后Nginx以反向代理的身份来处理客户端请求

从上图不难看出看出负载均衡算法是在反向代理服务器上实现的。而本文要谈的是客户端负载均衡，它是在客户端上实现的。客户端负载均衡和后端负载均衡是互不冲突的

模拟常见负载均衡策略

以下代码并不严禁，仅用于理解

随机算法

public class Test {    private static Random random = null;    private static List<String> userServices = null;    static {        random = new Random();        // 服务列表        userServices = List.of("192.168.31.100", "192.168.31.102", "192.168.31.103");    }    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        for (int i = 0; i <50 ; i++) {            int index = random.nextInt(userServices.size());            // 随机在服务列表中选择            String userService = userServices.get(index);        }    }}

权重随机算法

public class Test {    private static Random random = null;    private static List<String> userServices = null;    private static Map<String, Integer> weightMap = null;    static {        random = new Random();        // 设置权重（权重大的话被调用的几率就大）        weightMap = new TreeMap<>();        weightMap.put("192.168.31.100", 2);        weightMap.put("192.168.31.102", 1);        weightMap.put("192.168.31.103", 4);        // 用于存放加权后的服务列表        userServices = new ArrayList<>();        Iterator<Map.Entry<String, Integer>> iterator = weightMap.entrySet().iterator();        while (iterator.hasNext()) {            Map.Entry<String, Integer> next = iterator.next();            Integer count = next.getValue();            if(count <= 0) count = 1;            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) { // 加权操作                userServices.add(next.getKey());            }        }    }    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        for (int i = 0; i <10 ; i++) {            int index = random.nextInt(userServices.size());            // 加权随机调用            String userService = userServices.get(index);            System.out.println("负载均衡调用：" + userService);        }        /**         * 调用结果：             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.102             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103         */    }}

轮询算法

public class Test {    private static List<String> userServices = null;    private static int position = 0;    static {        userServices = List.of("192.168.31.100", "192.168.31.102", "192.168.31.103");    }    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        for (int i = 0; i <10 ; i++) {            String userService = userServices.get(position++);            if (position >= userServices.size()) {                position = 0;            }            System.out.println("负载均衡调用：" + userService);        }        /**         * 调用结果：             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.102             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.102             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.102             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100         */    }}

权重轮询算法

import java.util.*;public class Test {    private static List<String> userServices = null;    private static Map<String, Integer> weightMap = null;    private static int position = 0;    static {        // 设置服务器的权重        weightMap = new TreeMap<>();        weightMap.put("192.168.31.100", 2);        weightMap.put("192.168.31.102", 1);        weightMap.put("192.168.31.103", 4);        // 加权后的服务列表        userServices = new ArrayList<>();        Iterator<Map.Entry<String, Integer>> iterator = weightMap.entrySet().iterator();        while (iterator.hasNext()) {            Map.Entry<String, Integer> next = iterator.next();            Integer count = next.getValue();            if(count <= 0){                count = 1;            }            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {                userServices.add(next.getKey());            }        }    }    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        for (int i = 0; i <10 ; i++) {            String userService = userServices.get(position++);            if (position >= userServices.size()) {                position = 0;            }            System.out.println("负载均衡调用：" + userService);        }        /**         * 调用结果：             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.102             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.103             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.100             负载均衡调用：192.168.31.102         */    }}

最少连接数算法

Connect类

// Lombok@NoArgsConstructor@Datapublic class Connect {  // 连接对象    private String serviceName;    private String ip;    private volatile AtomicInteger; // 连接数    public Connect(String serviceName, String ip) {        this.serviceName = serviceName;        this.ip = ip;        this.count = new AtomicInteger(0);    }}

算法实现

public class Test implements Runnable {    private List<Connect> connects = null;    public Test(List<Connect> connects) {        this.connects = connects;    }    @Override    public void run() {        // 获取连接        Connect connect = getConnect();        try {            // 模拟处理业务时间            TimeUnit.SECONDS.sleep(new Random().nextInt(10));        } catch (InterruptedException e) {            e.printStackTrace();        }        // 释放连接        releaseConnect(connect);    }    // 释放连接    public void releaseConnect(Connect conn) {        conn.getCount().decrementAndGet();    }    // 获取连接    public synchronized Connect getConnect() {        // 获取连接前先按照连接次数排序（冒泡算法），找出最少连接的服务        for (int i = 0; i < connects.size() - 1; i++) {            for (int j = 0; j < connects.size()-i-1; j++) {                Connect connect = connects.get(j);                Connect connect2 = connects.get(j+1);                if (connect.getCount().get() > connect2.getCount().get()) {                    connects.set(j, connect2);                    connects.set(j + 1, connect);                }            }        }        Connect conn = connects.get(0);        conn.getCount().incrementAndGet();        return conn;    }    public static void main(String[] args) {        // 服务列表        List<Connect> list = new ArrayList<>();        list.add(new Connect("user-service", "192.168.31.101"));        list.add(new Connect("user-service", "192.168.31.102"));        list.add(new Connect("user-service", "192.168.31.103"));        // 50个请求        ExecutorService service = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(20);        T5 task = new T5(list);        for (int i = 0; i <50 ; i++) {            service.submit(task);        }    }}

IP哈希取模算法

public class Test {    private static String[] userServices; // 服务列表    private static String[] clients; // 客户端列表    static {        clients = new String[]{"12.4.55.13", "192.168.31.102", "16.6.3.2", "123.454.33.77", "2.2.2.2"};        userServices = new String[]{"192.168.31.100", "192.168.31.102", "192.168.31.103"};    }    public static void main(String[] args) {        for (int i = 0; i <100 ; i++) {            for (String client : clients) {                // ip哈希取模                int index = client.hashCode() % userServices.length;                  // 获取服务                String server = userServices[index]            }        }    }}

一致性哈希

public class Test {    /**     * 简易版一致性哈希     * @param client 客户单key     * @param serviceNode 服务列表     * @return     */    public static String getService(String client, String[] serviceNode) {        // 预先将服务节点固定在哈希环上（这里使用TreeMap来实现哈希环）        TreeMap<Integer, String> treeMap = new TreeMap<>();        for (int i = 0; i < serviceNode.length; i++) {            String service = serviceNode[i];            // 加大间隔，模拟让节点更加离散            treeMap.put(service.hashCode() * (i+1), service);        }        // 获取等于或大于 client.hashCode() 的服务节点        SortedMap<Integer, String> sm = treeMap.tailMap(client.hashCode());        try {            return treeMap.get(sm.firstKey());        } catch (NoSuchElementException e) {            return treeMap.get(treeMap.firstKey());        }    }    public static void main(String[] args) {        String[] clients = new String[]{"33.33.33.33", "66.66.66.66", "123.123.123.123"};        String[] userServices = new String[]{"192.168.31.100",                "192.168.31.102",                "192.168.31.103",                "12.4.55.13",                "192.168.31.102",                "16.6.3.2",                "123.454.33.77",                "2.2.2.2"};        // 模拟每个用户分别调用3次        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {            for (String client : clients) {                String service = getService(client, userServices);                System.out.println(service);            }        }        /**         * 调用结果：             192.168.31.103             192.168.31.102             16.6.3.2             192.168.31.103             192.168.31.102             16.6.3.2             192.168.31.103             192.168.31.102             16.6.3.2         */    }}
  • Google Guava 中有个 Hashing 类也提供了一致性哈希的实现，使用也十分简单

Netflix Ribbon

Ribbon是Netflix开源的客户端负载均衡器，亦是 SpringCloud 目前默认的客户端负载均衡器。

快速入门

依赖（Eureka和Consul默认导入）

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencies>    <!-- SpringnCloud Netflix Eureka Client -->    <!-- Eureka已经依赖了ribbon -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId>    </dependency><!--    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-ribbon</artifactId>    </dependency>-->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>

使用ribbon

@Configurationpublic class RestConfig {    @Autowired    private RestTemplateBuilder builder;    @LoadBalanced // 开启客户端负载均衡（服务发现）    @Bean    public RestTemplate restTemplate() {        return builder.build();    }}

了解负载均衡器

Spring Cloud 中定义了 LoadBalancerClient 作为客户端负载均衡的通用接口（可以用@Autowired获取该依赖），并且提供了 Ribbon 或 Consul 两种实例。

public ServiceInstance choose(String serviceId, Object hint) {    // 获取负载均衡后的服务    Server server = getServer(getLoadBalancer(serviceId), hint);    return new RibbonServer(serviceId,                             server,                             isSecure(server, serviceId),serverIntrospector(serviceId).getMetadata(server));}protected Server getServer(ILoadBalancer loadBalancer, Object hint) {    return loadBalancer.chooseServer(hint != null ? hint : "default");}

负载均衡器接口

public interface ILoadBalancer {    // 添加服务（com.netflix.loadbalancer.Server）    public void addServers(List<Server> newServers);    // 获取负载均衡后的服务    public Server chooseServer(Object key);    // 通知服务已失效    public void markServerDown(Server server);    // 获取健康的服务列表    public List<Server> getReachableServers();    // 获取所有服务列表    public List<Server> getAllServers();}

AbstractLoadBalancer 源码

负载均衡器抽象

public abstract class AbstractLoadBalancer implements ILoadBalancer {    public enum ServerGroup{        ALL, // 所有服务        STATUS_UP, // 健康的服务        STATUS_NOT_UP // 没有启动的服务    }    // 获取服务列表    public abstract List<Server> getServerList(ServerGroup serverGroup);    // 获取负载均衡统计    public abstract LoadBalancerStats getLoadBalancerStats();    }

BaseLoadBalancer 源码

BaseLoadBalancer 是 Ribbon 负载均衡器基础实现

public class BaseLoadBalancer extends AbstractLoadBalancer {    // 默认负载均衡策略RoundRobinRule    private final static IRule DEFAULT_RULE = new RoundRobinRule();    protected IRule rule = DEFAULT_RULE;    // 所有服务    @Monitor(name = PREFIX + "AllServerList", type = DataSourceType.INFORMATIONAL)    protected volatile List<Server> allServerList = Collections            .synchronizedList(new ArrayList<Server>());    // 健康服务    @Monitor(name = PREFIX + "UpServerList", type = DataSourceType.INFORMATIONAL)    protected volatile List<Server> upServerList = Collections            .synchronizedList(new ArrayList<Server>());    private static final String DEFAULT_NAME = "default";    public BaseLoadBalancer() {        this.name = DEFAULT_NAME;        this.ping = null;        setRule(DEFAULT_RULE);        setupPingTask();        lbStats = new LoadBalancerStats(DEFAULT_NAME);    }    // 设置用来检测服务是否可用的Ping任务    void setupPingTask() {        lbTimer.schedule(new PingTask(), 0, pingIntervalSeconds * 1000);        forceQuickPing();    }    // Ping任务    class PingTask extends TimerTask {        public void run() {            new Pinger(pingStrategy).runPinger();        }    }    // 获取负载均衡后的服务地址    public String choose(Object key) {        Server svr = rule.choose(key);        return ((svr == null) ? null : svr.getId());    }    // 获取负载均衡后的服务    public Server chooseServer(Object key) {       if (counter == null) {           counter = createCounter();       }       counter.increment();       return rule.choose(key);    }    // 添加服务到服务列表    public void addServer(Server newServer) {        ArrayList<Server> newList = new ArrayList<Server>();        newList.addAll(allServerList);        newList.add(newServer);        // 添加到 allServerList 和 upServerList中        setServersList(newList);    }}

DynamicServerListLoadBalancer 源码

  • 继承自BaseLoadBalancer
  • 支持运行期间动态更新服务
  • 一般会结合服务发现客户端使用
@Configurationpublic class EurekaRibbonClientConfiguration {    // 创建ping任务    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean    public IPing ribbonPing(IClientConfig config) {        NIWSDiscoveryPing ping = new NIWSDiscoveryPing();        ping.initWithNiwsConfig(config);        return ping;    }    // 创建ServerList    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean    public ServerList<?> ribbonServerList(/**/) {        DomainExtractingServerList serverList =             new DomainExtractingServerList(discoveryServerList, config, this.approximateZoneFromHostname);        return serverList;    }    // 创建Server拦截器    @Bean    public ServerIntrospector serverIntrospector() {        return new EurekaServerIntrospector();    }}// 服务更新器public interface ServerListUpdater {    public interface UpdateAction {        void doUpdate();    }    // 启动更新器    void start(UpdateAction updateAction);    // 停止更新器    void stop();    // 获取核心线程数    int getCoreThreads();    String getLastUpdate();    long getDurationSinceLastUpdateMs();    int getNumberMissedCycles();}public class DynamicServerListLoadBalancer<T extends Server> extends BaseLoadBalancer {    // 服务列表    volatile ServerList<T> serverListImpl;    // 服务列表过滤器    volatile ServerListFilter<T> filter;    // 更新服务列表    protected final ServerListUpdater.UpdateAction updateAction         = new ServerListUpdater.UpdateAction() {        @Override        public void doUpdate() {            updateListOfServers();        }    };        // 服务列表更新器    protected volatile ServerListUpdater serverListUpdater;    // 启动服务列表更新器    public void enableAndInitLearnNewServersFeature() {        serverListUpdater.start(updateAction);    }    // 停止服务列表更新器    public void stopServerListRefreshing() {        if (serverListUpdater != null) {            serverListUpdater.stop();        }    }    // 获取服务列表更新器核心线程数    @Monitor(name="NumThreads", type=DataSourceType.GAUGE)    public int getCoreThreads() {        return serverListUpdater.getCoreThreads();    }    // 更新服务列表    @VisibleForTesting    public void updateListOfServers() {        List<T> servers = new ArrayList<T>();        // 获取需要更新的服务列表        servers = serverListImpl.getUpdatedListOfServers();        // 进行过滤        servers = filter.getFilteredListOfServers(servers);        updateAllServerList(servers);    }    protected void updateAllServerList(List<T> ls) {        if (serverListUpdateInProgress.compareAndSet(false, true)) {            try {                // 更新成功设置为可用                for (T s : ls) {                    s.setAlive(true);                }                setServersList(ls);                super.forceQuickPing();            } finally {                serverListUpdateInProgress.set(false);            }        }    }}

ZoneAwareLoadBalancer 源码

  • 继承自 DynamicServerListLoadBalancer
  • 引入了 Zone 来划分服务
  • 重写了 setRule 方法 （DynamicServerListLoadBalancer 默认使用 BaseLoadBalancer 中的 RoundRobinRule）
public class ZoneAwareLoadBalancer<T extends Server> extends DynamicServerListLoadBalancer<T> {    // String：Zone    // BaseLoadBalancer:对应的负载均衡器    private ConcurrentHashMap<String, BaseLoadBalancer> balancers = new ConcurrentHashMap<String, BaseLoadBalancer>();    // 设置负载均衡策略    @Override    public void setRule(IRule rule) {        super.setRule(rule);        if (balancers != null) {            for (String zone: balancers.keySet()) {                // 设置到所有zone中                balancers.get(zone).setRule(cloneRule(rule));            }        }    }    // 获取某个zone的负载均衡器    @VisibleForTesting    BaseLoadBalancer getLoadBalancer(String zone) {        zone = zone.toLowerCase();        BaseLoadBalancer loadBalancer = balancers.get(zone);        if (loadBalancer == null) {            IRule rule = cloneRule(this.getRule());            loadBalancer = new BaseLoadBalancer(this.getName() + "_" + zone, rule, this.getLoadBalancerStats());            BaseLoadBalancer prev = balancers.putIfAbsent(zone, loadBalancer);            if (prev != null) {                loadBalancer = prev;            }        }         return loadBalancer;            }    // 获取负载均衡后的服务    @Override    public Server chooseServer(Object key) {        Server server = null;        try {            LoadBalancerStats lbStats = getLoadBalancerStats();            Map<String, ZoneSnapshot> zoneSnapshot = ZoneAvoidanceRule.createSnapshot(lbStats);            // 获取可用的zone            Set<String> availableZones = ZoneAvoidanceRule.getAvailableZones(zoneSnapshot, triggeringLoad.get(), triggeringBlackoutPercentage.get());            if (availableZones != null &&  availableZones.size() < zoneSnapshot.keySet().size()) {                // 在可用zone中随机选择一个                String zone = ZoneAvoidanceRule.randomChooseZone(zoneSnapshot, availableZones);                if (zone != null) {                    // 获取该zone的负载均衡器                    BaseLoadBalancer zoneLoadBalancer = getLoadBalancer(zone);                    // 返回经过负载均衡的服务                    server = zoneLoadBalancer.chooseServer(key);                }            }        }         return server;    }}

常用负载均衡策略

RandomRule：随机策略

// 获取随机下标protected int chooseRandomInt(int serverCount) {    return ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextInt(serverCount);}// 返回负载均衡后的服务@Overridepublic Server choose(Object key) {    return choose(getLoadBalancer(), key);}// 获取服务过程public Server choose(ILoadBalancer lb, Object key) {    Server server = null;    while (server == null) { // 死循环获取直到不为null        if (Thread.interrupted()) {            return null;        }        List<Server> upList = lb.getReachableServers(); // 可用服务列表        List<Server> allList = lb.getAllServers(); // 所有服务        int serverCount = allList.size();        if (serverCount == 0) {            return null;        }        // 获取随机下标        int index = chooseRandomInt(serverCount);        server = upList.get(index); // 从可用服务列表中获取        if (server.isAlive()) {            return (server);        }    }    return server;}

RoundRibbonRule：轮询策略

// 获取服务public Server choose(ILoadBalancer lb, Object key) {    Server server = null;    int count = 0;    while (server == null && count++ < 10) {        List<Server> reachableServers = lb.getReachableServers();        List<Server> allServers = lb.getAllServers();        int upCount = reachableServers.size(); // up状态的服务数量        int serverCount = allServers.size(); // 服务列表中的服务数量        // 轮询获取服务下标        int nextServerIndex = incrementAndGetModulo(serverCount);        server = allServers.get(nextServerIndex);        // 得到结果后如果是可用的就返回        if (server.isAlive() && (server.isReadyToServe())) {            return (server);        }        // Next.        server = null;    }    return server;}

RetryRule：基于轮询的重试策略

IRule subRule = new RoundRobinRule();// 获取服务public Server choose(ILoadBalancer lb, Object key) {    long requestTime = System.currentTimeMillis();    long deadline = requestTime + maxRetryMillis;    Server answer = null;    // 先用轮询获取    answer = subRule.choose(key);    // 当获取到的服务不可用则进入重试    if (((answer == null) || (!answer.isAlive()))        && (System.currentTimeMillis() < deadline)) {        InterruptTask task = new InterruptTask(deadline                                    - System.currentTimeMillis());        while (!Thread.interrupted()) {            answer = subRule.choose(key);            if (((answer == null) || (!answer.isAlive()))                && (System.currentTimeMillis() < deadline)) {                Thread.yield();            } else {                break;            }        }        task.cancel();    }    return answer;}

AvailabilityFilteringRule：可用轮询策略

AvailabilityPredicate

// 过滤方法@Overridepublic boolean apply(@Nullable PredicateKey input) {    LoadBalancerStats stats = getLBStats();    if (stats == null) return true;    return !shouldSkipServer(stats.getSingleServerStat(input.getServer()));}private boolean shouldSkipServer(ServerStats stats) {            if ((CIRCUIT_BREAKER_FILTERING.get() && stats.isCircuitBreakerTripped())         || stats.getActiveRequestsCount() >= activeConnectionsLimit.get()) {        return true;    }    return false;}

CompositePredicate

// 返回已过滤的Server@Overridepublic List<Server> getEligibleServers(List<Server> servers, Object loadBalancerKey) {    List<Server> result =         super.getEligibleServers(servers, loadBalancerKey);    Iterator<AbstractServerPredicate> i = fallbacks.iterator();    while (!(result.size() >= minimalFilteredServers && result.size() > (int) (servers.size() * minimalFilteredPercentage))           && i.hasNext()) {        AbstractServerPredicate predicate = i.next();        result = predicate.getEligibleServers(servers, loadBalancerKey);    }    return result;}// 过滤轮询public Optional<Server> chooseRoundRobinAfterFiltering(List<Server> servers) {    List<Server> eligible = getEligibleServers(servers);    if (eligible.size() == 0) {        return Optional.absent();    }    return Optional.of(eligible.get(incrementAndGetModulo(eligible.size())));}

AvailabilityFilteringRule

private AbstractServerPredicate predicate; public AvailabilityFilteringRule() {    super();    predicate = CompositePredicate.withPredicate(new AvailabilityPredicate(this, null))        .addFallbackPredicate(AbstractServerPredicate.alwaysTrue())        .build();}@Overridepublic AbstractServerPredicate getPredicate() {    return predicate;}// 获取服务@Overridepublic Server choose(Object key) {    int count = 0;    // 轮询服务    Server server = roundRobinRule.choose(key);    while (count++ <= 10) {        // 如果没有故障则返回        if (predicate.apply(new PredicateKey(server))) {            return server;        }        server = roundRobinRule.choose(key);    }    return super.choose(key);}

ZoneAvoidanceRule（默认） ：优质服务轮询策略

// 复合过滤private CompositePredicate compositePredicate;@Overridepublic AbstractServerPredicate getPredicate() {    return compositePredicate;}public ZoneAvoidanceRule() {    super();    // 劣质zone过滤    ZoneAvoidancePredicate zonePredicate = new ZoneAvoidancePredicate(this);    // 可用过滤    AvailabilityPredicate availabilityPredicate = new AvailabilityPredicate(this);    // 复合过滤 zonePredicate + availabilityPredicate    compositePredicate = createCompositePredicate(zonePredicate, availabilityPredicate);}// 筛选zonepublic static Set<String> getAvailableZones(    Map<String, ZoneSnapshot> snapshot, double triggeringLoad,    double triggeringBlackoutPercentage) {    // 获取可用zone    Set<String> availableZones = new HashSet<String>(snapshot.keySet());    if (availableZones.size() == 1) {        return availableZones; // 如果只有一个直接返回zone    }    Set<String> worstZones = new HashSet<String>();    double maxLoadPerServer = 0;    boolean limitedZoneAvailability = false;    for (Map.Entry<String, ZoneSnapshot> zoneEntry : snapshot.entrySet()) {        String zone = zoneEntry.getKey();        ZoneSnapshot zoneSnapshot = zoneEntry.getValue();        int instanceCount = zoneSnapshot.getInstanceCount();        // 如果zone没有服务则移除zone        if (instanceCount == 0) {            availableZones.remove(zone);            limitedZoneAvailability = true;        } else { // zone中有服务            double loadPerServer = zoneSnapshot.getLoadPerServer();            if (((double) zoneSnapshot.getCircuitTrippedCount())                / instanceCount >= triggeringBlackoutPercentage                || loadPerServer < 0) {                availableZones.remove(zone);                limitedZoneAvailability = true;            } else {                if (Math.abs(loadPerServer - maxLoadPerServer) < 0.000001d) {                    worstZones.add(zone);                } else if (loadPerServer > maxLoadPerServer) {                    maxLoadPerServer = loadPerServer;                    worstZones.clear();                    worstZones.add(zone);                }            }        }    }   if (maxLoadPerServer < triggeringLoad && !limitedZoneAvailability) {            // zone override is not needed here            return availableZones;        }    String zoneToAvoid = randomChooseZone(snapshot, worstZones);    if (zoneToAvoid != null) {        availableZones.remove(zoneToAvoid);    }    return availableZones;}// 获取服务@Overridepublic Server choose(Object key) {    ILoadBalancer lb = getLoadBalancer();    // 过滤之后轮询获取服务    Optional<Server> server = getPredicate().chooseRoundRobinAfterFiltering(lb.getAllServers(), key);    if (server.isPresent()) {        return server.get();    } else {        return null;    }       }

从源码中学习Ribbon使用

自动配置

RibbonAutoConfiguration

// 客户端工厂@Beanpublic SpringClientFactory springClientFactory() {    SpringClientFactory factory = new SpringClientFactory();    factory.setConfigurations(this.configurations);    return factory;}

SpringClientFactory

public class SpringClientFactory extends NamedContextFactory<RibbonClientSpecification> {    static final String NAMESPACE = "ribbon";    public SpringClientFactory() {        // 这里传入了一个 RibbonClientConfiguration 来协助实例化        super(RibbonClientConfiguration.class, NAMESPACE, "ribbon.client.name");    }}

RibbonClientConfiguration

// 默认情况下Ribbon会使用HttpClient做HTTP请求@Import({ HttpClientConfiguration.class,          OkHttpRibbonConfiguration.class,        RestClientRibbonConfiguration.class, HttpClientRibbonConfiguration.class }) public class RibbonClientConfiguration {    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean    public IRule ribbonRule(IClientConfig config) {        // 默认负载均衡策略是优质服务轮询策略        ZoneAvoidanceRule rule = new ZoneAvoidanceRule();        rule.initWithNiwsConfig(config);        return rule;    }}

HttpClientRibbonConfiguration

@Beanpublic RibbonLoadBalancingHttpClient ribbonLoadBalancingHttpClient(    IClientConfig config,     ServerIntrospector serverIntrospector,    ILoadBalancer loadBalancer,     RetryHandler retryHandler,    CloseableHttpClient httpClient) {    // 创建一个HttpClient包装类    RibbonLoadBalancingHttpClient client = new RibbonLoadBalancingHttpClient(        httpClient, // httpClient请求工具        config,         serverIntrospector);    client.setLoadBalancer(loadBalancer); // 负载均衡类，包含负载均衡相关操作    client.setRetryHandler(retryHandler);    return client;}

RibbonLoadBalancingHttpClient 

public class RibbonLoadBalancerClient implements LoadBalancerClient {    private SpringClientFactory clientFactory;    // 获取对应服务的负载均衡器    protected ILoadBalancer getLoadBalancer(String serviceId) {            return this.clientFactory.getLoadBalancer(serviceId);    }       // 使用负载均衡器返回已经过负载均衡的服务实例    @Override    public ServiceInstance choose(String serviceId) {        Server server = this.getLoadBalancer().chooseServer(serviceId);        return new RibbonLoadBalancerClient.RibbonServer(serviceId, server);    }}

请求拦截

从 RibbonAutoConfiguration 点进 LoadBalancerAutoConfiguration 可以观察到有个内部类叫LoadBalancerInterceptorConfig

@Configuration@ConditionalOnMissingClass("org.springframework.retry.support.RetryTemplate")static class LoadBalancerInterceptorConfig {    // 创建负载均衡请求拦截器    @Bean    public LoadBalancerInterceptor ribbonInterceptor(        LoadBalancerClient loadBalancerClient,        LoadBalancerRequestFactory requestFactory) {        return new LoadBalancerInterceptor(loadBalancerClient, requestFactory);    }    // 将负载均衡拦截器添加到RestTemplate中    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean    public RestTemplateCustomizer restTemplateCustomizer(        // 注入负载均衡拦截器        final LoadBalancerInterceptor loadBalancerInterceptor) {        return restTemplate -> {            // 获取RestTemplate中的拦截器器列表            List<ClientHttpRequestInterceptor> list = new ArrayList<>(                restTemplate.getInterceptors());            // 将负载均衡拦截器添加到列表中            list.add(loadBalancerInterceptor);            restTemplate.setInterceptors(list);        };    }}

为什么 RestTemplate 可以添加拦截器？

可以看到 RestTemplate 继承了 InterceptingHttpAccessor 。那么 InterceptingHttpAccessor 是什么时候注入到 RestTemplate 的呢？继续回看自动配置类 RibbonAutoConfiguration 

@Configuration@ConditionalOnClass(HttpRequest.class)@ConditionalOnRibbonRestClientprotected static class RibbonClientHttpRequestFactoryConfiguration {    @Autowired    private SpringClientFactory springClientFactory;    // 根据 SpringClientFactory 创建一个 RibbonClientHttpRequestFactory        @Bean    public RibbonClientHttpRequestFactory ribbonClientHttpRequestFactory() {        return new RibbonClientHttpRequestFactory(this.springClientFactory);    }    // 将 RibbonClientHttpRequestFactory 注入到 RestTemplate 中    // 而重要的是 RibbonClientHttpRequestFactory 实现了 ClientHttpRequestFactory 接口的    @Bean    public RestTemplateCustomizer restTemplateCustomizer(        final RibbonClientHttpRequestFactory ribbonClientHttpRequestFactory) {        return restTemplate -> restTemplate            .setRequestFactory(ribbonClientHttpRequestFactory);    }}

LoadBalancerInterceptor 请求拦截过程

RibbonLoadBalancerClient

public <T> T execute(String serviceId, LoadBalancerRequest<T> request, Object hint)    throws IOException {    // 获取负载均衡器    ILoadBalancer loadBalancer = getLoadBalancer(serviceId);    // 获取经过负载均衡的服务    Server server = getServer(loadBalancer, hint);    // 封装成Ribbon服务    RibbonServer ribbonServer = new RibbonServer(        serviceId,         server,        isSecure(server, serviceId),        serverIntrospector(serviceId).getMetadata(server));    // 执行HTTP请求    return execute(serviceId, ribbonServer, request);}// 执行HTTP请求@Overridepublic <T> T execute(String serviceId, ServiceInstance serviceInstance,                     LoadBalancerRequest<T> request) throws IOException {    Server server = null;    if (serviceInstance instanceof RibbonServer) {        // 获取RibbonServer中的目标服务实例（已经经过负载均衡）        server = ((RibbonServer) serviceInstance).getServer();    }    // 发起请求    T returnVal = request.apply(serviceInstance);     statsRecorder.recordStats(returnVal);    return returnVal;}

自定义负载均衡规则

参考 RoundRobinRule

  1. 继承 AbstractLoadBalancerRule
  2. 实现主要方法 choose()
// RoundRobinRule例子public Server choose(ILoadBalancer lb, Object key) {    Server server = null;    int count = 0;    while (server == null && count++ < 10) {        List<Server> reachableServers = lb.getReachableServers();        List<Server> allServers = lb.getAllServers();        int upCount = reachableServers.size(); // up状态的服务数量        int serverCount = allServers.size(); // 服务列表中的服务数量        // 轮询        int nextServerIndex = incrementAndGetModulo(serverCount);        server = allServers.get(nextServerIndex);        // 得到结果后如果是可用的就返回        if (server.isAlive() && (server.isReadyToServe())) {            return (server);        }        // Next.        server = null;    }    return server;}
  1. 将自定义负载均衡策略Bean添加到上下文
@Configurationpublic class RibbonConfig {    @Bean    public IRule ribbonRule(IClientConfig config) {        return new RoundRobinRule();    }  }

参考

  • Spring Cloud各组件重试总结

内容修订

entry.title: 微服务开发技术篇-服务注册中心
entry.content:
前言

为什么需要服务注册中心

没有服务注册中心时，服务调用是这样子的

以上这种模式存在以下问题：

  • 服务提供者扩展节点时，服务消费者需要修改配置
  • 当服务提供者出现故障导致不可用时，服务消费者无法感知

使用反向代理改良以后是这个样子的

基于上面的问题，我们可以引入反向代理服务器来代理某个服务提供者集群。这时服务消费者只需要调用反向代理服务器就可访问到服务。但这种方法依然存在问题：

  • 存在单点问题，要求反向代理服务器支持集群功能
  • 反向代理服务器能够解决服务提供者宕机转发功能，但服务提供者节点扩容和缩容时，反向代理服务器依然无法感知，即扩容和缩容后需要手动修改反向代理服务器的配置

引入支持 服务注册 和 发现 的 服务注册中心 后是这个样子的

  1. 服务提供者启动时将自己暴露的服务列表注册到服务注册中心
  2. 服务消费者拿着自己需要的服务名单到服务注册中心查找，然后服务注册中心将对应的服务提供者列表响应给服务消费者
  3. 服务消费者接收到服务注册中心响应的服务列表后就会按照相应的选择策略来从中选择一个服务提供者进行点对点调用

不难看出服务注册和发现这两个动作解决了服务节点变动时需要手动修改配置的问题。还有就是注册中心通常使用心跳机制来感知服务提供者是否可用，如果某个服务提供者不可用，服务注册中心就会将该服务提供者从可用服务列表中移除，这么一来也解决了先前故障无法感知的问题了。

目前业界常用的服务注册中心

  • ZooKeeper
  • Netflix Eureka
  • Consul
  • Etcd

Netflix Eureka

介绍

  • Eureka是Netflix旗下开源的服务注册中心，目前版本是 Eureka 1.x
  • GitHub首页已明确表明 Eureka 2.x 已经停止开源工作 （Eureka 1.x 依然在维护）
  • 针对上面所述问题个人觉得并不需要顾虑太多，如果 Eureka 1.x 不足以满足使用需求，完全可以使用 Consul 、ZooKeeper 又或者阿里的 Nacos 来代替
  • 从CAP定理角度来看，Eureka 是一个 AP 系统（集群节点需要定时获取其他节点的服务列表）

快速入门

Eureka服务端

添加依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <springcloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</springcloud.version></properties><!-- spring cloud版本控制 --><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${springcloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <!-- SpringnCloud Netflix Eureka Server -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-server</artifactId>    </dependency>    <!-- SpringBoot Actuator -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>    </dependency>    </dependencies>

配置

# actuator端点配置management:  endpoints:    web:      exposure:        include: '*'# 服务端口server:  port: 8761# 应用名称spring:  application:    name: msa-eureka-server# Eureka Server  eureka:  client:    registerWithEureka: false # 不注册服务    fetch-registry: false # 不获取服务列表    region: us-east-1 # 默认region    serviceUrl:      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka/ # 默认zone地址，用于注册和发现

启用 Eureka Server

@EnableEurekaServer@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaEurekaApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(MsaEurekaApplication.class, args);    }}

访问：http://localhost:8761

Eureka客户端

添加依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <!-- 通用接口 -->    <dependency>        <groupId>wiki.td</groupId>        <artifactId>msa-interface</artifactId>        <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>    </dependency>    <!-- SpringnCloud Netflix Eureka Client -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId>    </dependency>    <!-- SpringBoot Actuator -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>
服务提供者

配置

management:  endpoints:    web:      exposure:        include: '*'server:  port: 8080eureka:  client:    serviceUrl:      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka/ # 默认spring:  application:    name: msa-eureka-provider-user

要暴露的服务

@RequestMapping("/user")@RestControllerpublic class UserController {    @Autowired    private UserService userService;    @DeleteMapping("/delete/{id}")    public User deleteUserById(@PathVariable Long id) {        return userService.deleteById(id);    }    @GetMapping("/find/all")    public List<User> findAll() {        return userService.findAll();    }    @PostMapping("/add")    public User addUser(User user) {        return userService.addUser(user);    }}

启用服务提供者

@EnableEurekaClient@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaEurekaProviderUserApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) {    SpringApplication.run(MsaEurekaProviderUserApplication.class, args);    }}

成功注册的话可以在服务注册中心看到如下内容

服务消费者

配置

management:  endpoints:    web:      exposure:        include: '*'server:  port: 8081eureka:  client:    serviceUrl:      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka/ # 默认    register-with-eureka: false # 不注册服务spring:  application:    name: msa-eureka-comsumer-01

调用注册中心的服务

创建 RestTemplate

@Configurationpublic class RestConfig {    @Autowired    private RestTemplateBuilder builder;    // 客户端负载均衡（开启服务发现）    @LoadBalanced    @Bean    public RestTemplate restTemplate() {        return builder.build();    }}

使用服务

@Slf4j@Repositorypublic class MessageRepository {    // 要调用的服务    private final static String SERVEICE_NAME ="MSA-EUREKA-PROVIDER-USER";    // HTTP请求工具    @Autowired    private RestTemplate restTemplate;    // 服务发现客户端    @Autowired    private DiscoveryClient discoveryClient;    // delete请求    public User deleteUserById(Long id) {        String urlPrefix = "http://";        String urlSuffix = "/user/delete/{id}";        String url = urlPrefix + SERVEICE_NAME + urlSuffix;        // restTemplate.delete(url, id); // 无返回值        ResponseEntity<User> exchange = restTemplate.exchange(url, HttpMethod.DELETE, null, User.class, id);        return exchange.getBody();    }    // get请求    public List selectAllUser() {        String urlPrefix = "http://";        String urlSuffix = "/user/find/all";        String url = urlPrefix + SERVEICE_NAME + urlSuffix;        List<ServiceInstance> instances = discoveryClient.getInstances(SERVEICE_NAME);        List<String> services = discoveryClient.getServices();        String description = discoveryClient.description();        log.info("服务名称：{}", services);        log.info("服务提供者：{}", instances);        log.info("服务描述：{}", description);        return restTemplate.getForObject(url, List.class);    }    // post请求    public User addUser(User user) {        String urlPrefix = "http://";        String urlSuffix = "/user/add";        String url = urlPrefix + SERVEICE_NAME + urlSuffix;        // 请求头        HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();        headers.setContentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED);        // 请求体        MultiValueMap<String, Object> map= new LinkedMultiValueMap<>();        map.add("id", user.getId());        map.add("name", user.getName());        map.add("age", user.getAge());        // 请求内容        HttpEntity<MultiValueMap<String, Object>> request = new HttpEntity<>(map, headers);        return restTemplate.postForEntity(url, request, User.class).getBody();    }}

启用 Eureka Client

@EnableEurekaClient@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaEurekaComsumer01Application {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(MsaEurekaComsumer01Application.class, args);    }}

Eureka支持的端点操作

操作HTTP请求描述
注册新的应用实例POST /eureka/apps/appID提交内容格式：JSON/XML
注销某个应用实例DELETE /eureka/apps/appID/instanceID
发送应用实例心跳PUT /eureka/apps/appID/instanceID
查询所有实例GET /eureka/apps
查询appID的所有实例GET /eureka/apps/appID
查询特定的appID/instanceIDGET /eureka/apps/appID/instanceID
查询特定的instanceIDGET /eureka/instances/instanceID
停止某个服务实例PUT /eureka/apps/appID/instanceID/status？value = OUT_OF_SERVICE
恢复某个服务实例DELETE /eureka/apps/appID/instanceID/status?value=UP
更新元数据PUT /eureka/apps/appID/instanceID/metadata?key=value

特性和源码浅析

基础架构

Netflix Eureka 集群图（源自 https://github.com/Netflix/eureka ）

上图是 Eureka 1.x 在 Netflix 内部中的部署架构。在 Eureka 架构中有两个较为重要的概念，分别是：Region、Zone。Region可以理解为 Eureka 所在的区域，而 Zone 可以理解为 Eureka 所在机房。一个Region 可以包含多个Zone，而且每个 Region 中至少含有一个 Eureka Server 。 Zone与Zone、Region与Region之间形成高可用集群。如下：

默认情况下 Eureka 使用的 Region 为 us-east-1，而 Zone 为 http://localhost:8761/eureka/，如下：

eureka:  client:  # 以下为默认配置，所以可以省略    serviceUrl:      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka/    region: us-east-1

EurekaClientConfigBean 源码

private String region = "us-east-1";public static final String DEFAULT_ZONE = "defaultZone";@Overridepublic String[] getAvailabilityZones(String region) {    // 如果没有配置就用默认的    String value = this.availabilityZones.get(region);    if (value == null) {        value = DEFAULT_ZONE;    }    return value.split(",");}

服务注册和发现时机

  Eureka Client 将服务注册到 Eureka Server 后会每隔30秒就发送心跳包给Eureka Server以示对服务进行续约。如果 Eureka Server在90s（默认）内没有收到某个服务提供者的续约心跳包，那么就会从可用服务列表中下线该服务（前提是没有出现网络分区，因为一旦出现网络分区Eureka Server就会触发保护机制，例如Eureka Server在短时间内发现丢失了大量客户端连接时）。

  Eureka Client 从 Eureka Server 中获取到服务列表后会对其进行缓存，然后再每隔30s（默认）重新抓取一次服务列表。这样做的原因主要是防止 Eureka Server 宕机导致 Eureka Client 无法获取到服务列表，所以通过缓存服务列表可以在出现 Eureka Server 宕机后依然能够调用远程服务。

EurekaClientConfigBean 源码

Eureka Client 会使用 Ribbon 对抓取到的服务列表进行负载均衡调用，而在这之前 Eureka Client 需要先确立自己应该从哪个 Eureka Server 中抓取服务列表。

@Overridepublic List<String> getEurekaServerServiceUrls(String myZone) {    // 先从自己所在的 Zone 中获取 Eureka Server 服务    String serviceUrls = this.serviceUrl.get(myZone);    // 如果自己的所在 Zone 中没有，则到默认的 Zone 中查找    if (serviceUrls == null || serviceUrls.isEmpty()) {        serviceUrls = this.serviceUrl.get(DEFAULT_ZONE);    }    if (!StringUtils.isEmpty(serviceUrls)) {        final String[] serviceUrlsSplit = StringUtils            .commaDelimitedListToStringArray(serviceUrls);        List<String> eurekaServiceUrls = new ArrayList<>(serviceUrlsSplit.length);        for (String eurekaServiceUrl : serviceUrlsSplit) {            if (!endsWithSlash(eurekaServiceUrl)) {                eurekaServiceUrl += "/";            }            eurekaServiceUrls.add(eurekaServiceUrl.trim());        }        return eurekaServiceUrls;    }    return new ArrayList<>();}

Server自我保护机制

上面已经提到过 Eureka Server 实现了一种自我保护机制，该机制是专门用来应对网络分区的。如下图：

Eureka中服务状态有以下几种

  • UP：正常提供服务

  • DOWN：服务已下线

  • OUT_OF_SERVICE：已停止服务

  • UNKNOWN：未知

当 Eureka Server 短时间内发现大量客户端连接丢失就会进入自我保护模式。在自我保护模式下 Eureka Server 不会下线服务列表中的服务，这种状态会维持到网络分区恢复为止

服务注册过程

com.netflix.discovery.DiscoveryClient 源码

boolean register() throws Throwable {    EurekaHttpResponse<Void> httpResponse;    try {        // 注册服务        httpResponse = eurekaTransport.registrationClient.register(instanceInfo);    } catch (Exception e) {}    return httpResponse.getStatusCode() == Status.NO_CONTENT.getStatusCode();}

进入 eurekaTransport.registrationClient.register(instanceInfo);

@Overridepublic EurekaHttpResponse<Void> register(final InstanceInfo info) {    return execute(new RequestExecutor<Void>() {        @Override        public EurekaHttpResponse<Void> execute(EurekaHttpClient delegate) {             // 这里注意，默认情况下Eureka Client会使用Jersey来和Eureka Server通信。            // 当然也可以将其依赖排除，排除后就会使用RestTemplate做为代替            return delegate.register(info);        }        @Override        public RequestType getRequestType() {            return RequestType.Register;        }    });}

点进 delegate.register(info); 这里选择 RestTemplate 和 Eureka Server 通信

以下操作是拼接注册服务的请求（主要依赖Eureka支持的端点操作）

@Overridepublic EurekaHttpResponse<Void> register(InstanceInfo info) {    // 请求URL    String urlPath = serviceUrl + "apps/" + info.getAppName();    // 请求头    HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();    headers.add(HttpHeaders.ACCEPT_ENCODING, "gzip");    headers.add(HttpHeaders.CONTENT_TYPE, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE);    // 发出请求    ResponseEntity<Void> response = restTemplate.exchange(urlPath, HttpMethod.POST,                                                          new HttpEntity<>(info, headers), Void.class);    return anEurekaHttpResponse(response.getStatusCodeValue())        .headers(headersOf(response)).build();}

获取服务列表和续约服务的定时任务

com.netflix.discovery.DiscoveryClient 源码

private void initScheduledTasks() {    // 获取服务列表的定时任务    if (clientConfig.shouldFetchRegistry()) {        // registry cache refresh timer        // 重新抓取的时间间隔默认为30s（在EurekaClientConfigBean中定义）        int registryFetchIntervalSeconds = clientConfig.getRegistryFetchIntervalSeconds();        int expBackOffBound = clientConfig.getCacheRefreshExecutorExponentialBackOffBound();        scheduler.schedule(            new TimedSupervisorTask(                "cacheRefresh",                scheduler,                cacheRefreshExecutor,                registryFetchIntervalSeconds,                TimeUnit.SECONDS,                expBackOffBound,                new CacheRefreshThread()            ),            registryFetchIntervalSeconds, TimeUnit.SECONDS);    }    // 续约服务的定时任务    if (clientConfig.shouldRegisterWithEureka()) {        // 时间间隔默认为30s（LeaseInfo中定义）        int renewalIntervalInSecs = instanceInfo.getLeaseInfo().getRenewalIntervalInSecs();        int expBackOffBound = clientConfig.getHeartbeatExecutorExponentialBackOffBound();        // Heartbeat timer        scheduler.schedule(            new TimedSupervisorTask(                "heartbeat",                scheduler,                heartbeatExecutor,                renewalIntervalInSecs,                TimeUnit.SECONDS,                expBackOffBound,                new HeartbeatThread()            ),            renewalIntervalInSecs, TimeUnit.SECONDS);    }}

常用配置

具体配置操作可以参考 EurekaClientConfigBean 类

  • 关闭自我保护功能
eureka:  server:    enable-self-preservation: false
  • 屏蔽网卡
spring:  cloud:    inetutils:      ignored-interfaces:        - docker0        - veth.*eureka:  instance:    prefer-ip-address: true
  • 配置和获取服务元数据

添加元数据配置

spring:  application:    name: msa-eureka-provider-usereureka:  instance:    metadata-map:      metadata01: test1      metadata02: test2

编写查询接口

@RequestMapping("/user")@RestControllerpublic class UserController {    @Value("${spring.application.name}")    private String appID;    @Autowired    private DiscoveryClient discoveryClient;    @GetMapping("/service-instances")    public List<ServiceInstance> getServiceInstances(){        return discoveryClient.getInstances(appID);    }}

查询元数据

  • 定义服务注册到注册中心后的存活时间

默认90s，当Server在90s内没有收到续约心跳包就会下线服务）

eureka:  instance:    lease-expiration-duration-in-seconds: 90
  • 服务提供者续约时间间隔
eureka:  instance:    lease-renewal-interval-in-seconds: 30
  • 读取 Eureka Server 信息的超时时间
eureka:  client:    eureka-server-read-timeout-seconds: 8
  • 连接 Eureka Server 的超时时间
eureka:  client:        eureka-server-connect-timeout-seconds: 5

Consul案例

服务提供者

依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <!-- Spring Cloud Consul -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-consul-discovery</artifactId>    </dependency>    <!-- SpringBoot Actuator -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>

配置

management:  endpoints:    web:      exposure:        include: '*'server:  port: 8080spring:  application:    name: msa-consul-provider-user  cloud:    consul:      host: 192.168.31.250 # 注册中心ip      port: 8500      discovery:        hostname: 192.168.31.70 # 服务所在ip        tags:          - tag1          - tag2        # service-name会覆盖 application name        # service-name: service-name-01

启用 SpringCloud Consul Discovery

@EnableDiscoveryClient@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaConsulProviderUserApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(MsaConsulProviderUserApplication.class, args);    }}

服务消费者

依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <!-- Spring Cloud Consul -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-consul-discovery</artifactId>    </dependency>    <!-- SpringBoot Actuator -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>

消费服务

@Slf4j@Repositorypublic class MessageRepositor {    private final static String SERVEICE_NAME ="msa-consul-provider-user";    @Autowired    private RestTemplate restTemplate;    @Autowired    private DiscoveryClient discoveryClient;    public User deleteUserById(Long id) {        String urlPrefix = "http://";        String urlSuffix = "/user/delete/{id}";        String url = urlPrefix + SERVEICE_NAME + urlSuffix;        // restTemplate.delete(url, id); // 无返回值        ResponseEntity<User> exchange = restTemplate.exchange(url, HttpMethod.DELETE, null, User.class, id);        return exchange.getBody();    }    public List selectAllUser() {        String urlPrefix = "http://";        String urlSuffix = "/user/find/all";        String url = urlPrefix + SERVEICE_NAME + urlSuffix;        List<ServiceInstance> instances = discoveryClient.getInstances(SERVEICE_NAME);        List<String> services = discoveryClient.getServices();        String description = discoveryClient.description();        log.info("服务名称：{}", services);        log.info("服务提供者：{}", instances);        log.info("服务描述：{}", description);        return restTemplate.getForObject(url, List.class);    }    public User addUser(User user) {        String urlPrefix = "http://";        String urlSuffix = "/user/add";        String url = urlPrefix + SERVEICE_NAME + urlSuffix;        // 请求头        HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();        headers.setContentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED);        // 请求体        MultiValueMap<String, Object> map= new LinkedMultiValueMap<>();        map.add("id", user.getId());        map.add("name", user.getName());        map.add("age", user.getAge());        // 请求内容        HttpEntity<MultiValueMap<String, Object>> request = new HttpEntity<>(map, headers);        return restTemplate.postForEntity(url, request, User.class).getBody();    }}

启用 SpringCloud Consul Discovery

@EnableDiscoveryClient@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaConsulComsumer01Application {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(MsaConsulComsumer01Application.class, args);    }}

客户端服务注册发现源码浅析

依赖

<dependency>    <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-consul-discovery</artifactId></dependency>

ConsulDiscoveryClientConfiguration 源码

// 加载配置文件中的服务信息@Bean@ConditionalOnMissingBeanpublic ConsulDiscoveryProperties consulDiscoveryProperties(InetUtils inetUtils) {    return new ConsulDiscoveryProperties(inetUtils);}// 创建一个用于操作Consul的对象@Bean@ConditionalOnMissingBeanpublic ConsulDiscoveryClient consulDiscoveryClient(    ConsulDiscoveryProperties discoveryProperties) {    return new ConsulDiscoveryClient(this.consulClient, discoveryProperties);}

ConsulDiscoveryClient 源码

public class ConsulDiscoveryClient implements DiscoveryClient {    private static final Log log = LogFactory.getLog(ConsulDiscoveryClient.class);    // 可以看到其实实际操作的类是ConsulClient    // 而 ConsulClient是一个接口，实现在位于AgentConsulClient    private final ConsulClient client;    private final ConsulDiscoveryProperties properties;    public ConsulDiscoveryClient(ConsulClient client,            ConsulDiscoveryProperties properties) {        this.client = client;        this.properties = properties;    }}

AgentConsulClient 源码

// 服务注册@Overridepublic Response<Void> agentServiceRegister(NewService newService, String token) {    UrlParameters tokenParam = token != null ? new SingleUrlParameters("token", token) : null;    // 使用Goolgl Gson序列化服务注册信息    String json = GsonFactory.getGson().toJson(newService);    // 服务注册（默认使用HttpClient进行HTTP通信）    RawResponse rawResponse = rawClient.makePutRequest("/v1/agent/service/register", json, tokenParam);    // 返回注册结果    return new Response<Void>(null, rawResponse);}// 获取服务列表@Overridepublic Response<Map<String, Service>> getAgentServices() {    // 获取注册在Consul上的所有服务    RawResponse rawResponse = rawClient.makeGetRequest("/v1/agent/services");    // 封装到Map中    Map<String, Service> agentServices = GsonFactory.getGson()        .fromJson(rawResponse.getContent(),                  new TypeToken<Map<String, Service>>() {}.getType());    return new Response<Map<String, Service>>(agentServices, rawResponse);}

参考

  • 《Spring Cloud 微服务实战》
  • 《Spring Cloud与Docker 微服务架构实战》
  • Netflix / Eureka
  • 详解 Eureka 缓存机制
  • Spring Cloud Consul

内容修订

entry.title: 微服务开山篇-架构的演进之路
entry.content:
内容修订

  • 2019年03月21日13:57:24 — 有新的理解，对文章整体内容进行重构

闲聊

  近年来微服务架构是越来越火，各大论坛、博客、公众号都是相关的内容，以至于貌似不聊聊微服务自己就变得落伍了，但实话实说个人并不太喜欢这样的氛围，因为如何设计一个系统或进行技术选型，其实是应该根据业务、资源、团队等多个因数考量后决定出来的，而并非越新越好或越潮越好，正所谓“合适优于行业领先”就是这个道理。

  虽然现在讨论微服务的确实大有人在，但经常能看见的只是技术类的话题，而聊聊自己公司为什么要使用微服务，又或者用了微服务之后和原来相比有什么好处这类型的话题是少之又少。当然，这也可能是因为大家都是技术出身，所以关注点很自然就落在技术上了。

  个人认为，在学习一门技术之前应该要了解一下它为什么而存在，只有知道它为什么存在才能更直观地知道它解决了什么问题，以及如何更好地使用它。

单体架构

基本介绍

  单体架构是最为直观和简单的系统架构，这样说的理由其实很简单，因为功能都在一个点上，方便了开发、测试和管理。但需要注意的是系统架构本身很多时候是把双刃剑，用得好自然好，用不好也很麻烦。

譬如个人认为以下条件使用单体架构比较有优势：

  • 系统业务清晰和简单
  • 开发团队有着良好的编发规范
  • 资源有限，对性能没要求

而单体架构的优缺点如下：

  • 优点
    • 简单直观，容易维护
    • 方便开发、测试、部署
    • 资源门槛低
  • 缺点
    • 随着业务越来越复杂，系统会变得冗肿和难以维护，譬如牵一发而动全身，导致扩展性差
    • 代码耦合高，不太适合多人团队开发（发团队有良好的编发规范除外）
    • 对开发者要求较高，譬如国内中小型公司可能分工不够明确而导致开发者需要懂前后端技术，门槛稍高
    • 横向扩展不利于合理的资源利用，譬如著名的二八定理就很好地解析这个问题

传统的单体架构

当前架构存在的问题是单点负载，无法应对业务越来越复杂，用户量越来越多的场景需要。

横向扩展解决单点负载过高问题

虽然横向扩展服务节点能够解决单点负载问题，但与此同时亦带来问题。

  • 多服务节点下会话的管理问题。常见解决方案如下
    • Web服务器会话共享机制
    • 共享存储服务
    • Nginx 的 IP 访问绑定
    • 使用 Token 进行交互
  • 资源不能合理利用，因为在系统中可能只有几个功能被常用，但扩展式要全部部署

前后端分离让技术边界更加明确

随着前端技术的迅速发展，前后端分离架构的普及度已经非常高了。前后端进行分离后，不仅可以让技术分工更加明确，而且相较于最早的单体架构而言，后端服务节点变得更加轻量和简洁。

缺点是使用 Cookie - Sesssion 机制变得复杂（可通过 CORS + 代理转发请求头来实现），因此一般使用前后端分离架构，都会采用 Token 这种轻量的会话管理机制来维持通信。

分布式架构

是什么？

  譬如以前一些网络游戏的注册功能是嵌套在游戏本身的，但随着发展公司又开发或代理了更多的游戏，而这时如果玩家每次玩这家公司的新游戏就要记住一套账号那用户体验未免也太差了。因此在往后的日子里很多公司都约定俗成地将用户管理这块功能从软件或游戏中单独抽离了出来让其形成一个立的系统来提供服务。而个时候的游戏或软件就形成了一个分布式系统了，即游戏本身再加上账号管理系统才能算是一套完成的系统。

结论：功能分布在不同进程上的系统就叫分布式系统。

什么时候应该使用分布式架构？

  • 需要应对业务扩展带来的挑战
  • 单体系统过于冗肿，以至于日常维护困难

分布式架构优缺点

优点：

  • 降低了代码和模块的耦合度
